subject: Correction to c6e89a10: kind should be directed not mid-cycle-handoff
body: Previous directed event c6e89a10 carries ADR-184 amendment intent coordination but I mis-set --kind to mid-cycle-handoff (PDR-063/ADR-182-reserved for retirement protocols). This is a kind-metadata correction only; the substantive content of c6e89a10 stands. No retirement is in flight; this is generic coordination for the sequenced second commit cycle.
